title: How to Set Up and Use SpaceBot (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: SpaceBot is an open-source framework designed to build AI agents for community platforms including Discord, Telegram, Slack, Twitch, and WebChat. The video demonstrates Docker setup, model routing for token efficiency, platform integration, and practical applications like meme-scraping moderation and collaborative work across chat interfaces.
